title: Scalar upwind update preserves constant states

source.notes: Consistency seed for the scalar upwind update: if the left and current values agree, the update returns the same constant value.

informal.statement: For any real cfl and constant value u, the scalar upwind update with uLeft = u returns u.
assumptions: cfl and u are real numbers
the left and current cell values are equal
informal.expected_conclusion: The scalar upwind update preserves constant states.

declarations.name: upwindStep
declarations.statement: def upwindStep (cfl uLeft u : ℝ) : ℝ := (1 - cfl) * u + cfl * uLeft

declarations.name: upwindStep_const
declarations.statement: theorem upwindStep_const (cfl u : ℝ) : upwindStep cfl u u = u

tasks.input: Translate the constant-state preservation statement for the scalar upwind update into Lean 4.
tasks.target: theorem upwindStep_const (cfl u : ℝ) : upwindStep cfl u u = u

tasks.input: Given upwindStep and the theorem statement, complete the Lean 4 proof.
tasks.target: A proof using unfold upwindStep and ring.
